projects.name: specorator
projects.description: Obsidian plugin providing a spec-driven, agentic software development workflow cockpit. Guides teams from idea to release through an 11-stage lifecycle, maintaining all artifacts as editable Markdown within the vault. v2.0 will integrate agentonomous for agentic coworker capabilities.

projects.name: specorator-runtime
projects.description: Planned execution engine that will orchestrate agents and workflows at runtime. Acts as the central bridge between the UI layer and the agent/workflow subsystems — the component that makes the ecosystem fully interconnected.

projects.name: agentonomous
projects.description: Autonomous agent library for TypeScript. Provides the building blocks for intelligent task execution and agent behaviors. Will be integrated into specorator v2.0 to provide agentic coworker capabilities — assisting with drafting, review, and workflow progression.

projects.name: agentic-workflow
projects.description: Spec-driven 11-stage development workflow template (Idea → Research → Requirements → Design → Specification → Tasks → Implementation → Testing → Review → Release → Retrospective). Provides the methodology, templates, quality gates, and Claude Code agents that power specorator's workflow cockpit.
